name: Kindergarten Automotive & Mechanics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system through a close look at wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system through a guided practice with wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system.

lessons.title: Make or show: wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system through a small creation or demonstration about wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system.

units.title: Wonder and notice: wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system
units.essentialQuestion: What can we notice and wonder about wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system?
outcomes: I can notice details and share a question about wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system.
I can use words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate my thinking.

activities.title: A close look at wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system
activities.learnerAction: With an adult or teacher nearby when needed, the learner participates in a close look at wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system, uses words, pictures, movement, or materials to communicate thinking, and cleans up safely.

successCriteria: The learner participates safely and respectfully in wheels, motion, vehicle safety, and parts of a transportation system.
The learner communicates one observation, choice, or question using speech, drawing, movement, or a supported response.
